title: agrimonia eupatoria subvar. albiflora
intro: Agrimonia eupatoria subvar. albiflora, also known as White Agrimony or White Agrimonia, is a subspecies of the Agrimonia eupatoria plant, a perennial herb native to Europe, Asia, and North America. The medicinal properties of Agrimonia eupatoria subvar. albiflora include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory problems and menstrual cramps. Agrimonia eupatoria subvar. albiflora can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and make it easier to consume.
